release_notes:
- Fixed TX Power Table corruption — Exp field was truncated on display, causing all Exp values to be written back as 0x00
- BlueSuite missing/outdated prompt now appears immediately on startup instead of after 20 seconds
- Fixed BD Address not being written when clicking "Write Device Info" — edits were silently ignored
- BD Address editable prefix is now 3 separate byte fields instead of a single text box
- Added post-reset cooldown — device operations wait for the chip to settle after any reset
- XUV file path is now a dropdown that remembers the last 3 firmware images you used
- Version label in the footer is now clickable to view What's New
